person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Nicholas d 'Oisy, Lord of Avesnes, nicknamed le Beau ("the Beautiful") (c.?1130-?1170), was a son of Walter I, Lord of Avesnes and his wife, Ada of Tournai. He was Lord of Avesnes, Leuze and Condé. He built castles in Landrechies and Condé.

Nicholas was married to Matilda de la Roche, the widow of Thierry de Walcourt. She was the daughter of Henry I of la Roche (c.?1100-1126), Count of la Roche and warden of Stavelot and Malmedy and his wife, Matilda of Limburg. Her paternal grandfather was Albert III, Count of Namur; her maternal grandfather was Henry, Duke of Lower Lorraine.

They had the following children:

1.) James of Avesnes, succeeded his father and died during the Third Crusade

2.) Ida (d. c.?1205), married Ingelram, Count of Saint Pol and secondly, castellan William IV of Saint-Omer

3.) Fastrad, warden of La Flamengerie Abbey. He had three children, of whom James became bishop of Tournai

4.) a daughter

5.) possibly Radulf

sourceList.title: Guillaume II, III, and IV, Châtelains de Saint-Omer, in the Foundation for Medieval Genealogy ~https://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/NORTHERN%20FRANCE.htm#GuillaumeIVStOmerdied11911192 [See document in the Memories section]

Guy, Hughes II and III, and Enguerrand, Comtes de Saint-Pol, in the Founation for Medieval Genealogy ~https://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/NORTHERN%20FRANCE.htm#EnguerrandSaintPoldied1170 [See document in the Memories section]

zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas I D'Oisy Lord of Avesnes於1123年4月18日出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德艾維斯-素-爾時，他的父親Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy24歲，母親Ida de Mortagne29歲。他於大約1145年與Matilda de la Roche在比利時盧布格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1181年8月14日在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德維額 孔戴享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas I D'Oisy Lord of Avesnes于1123年4月18日出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德艾維斯-素-爾时，他的父亲Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy24岁，母亲Ida de Mortagne29岁。他于大约1145年与Matilda de la Roche在比利时盧布格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1181年8月14日在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德維額 孔戴享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: D'Oisy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Aime, Alphonse, Aurore, Fernand, Florent, Gilles, Manon, Michel.
French: from Old French foisil ‘gunflint’, used as a nickname for a maker or seller.
History: Martin Foisy from Bossus-lès-Rumigny in Ardennes married Marie-Madeleine Beaudoin in QC in 1679.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas I D'Oisy Lord of Avesnes was born on 18 April 1123, in Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy, was 24 and his mother, Ida de Mortagne, was 29. He married Matilda de la Roche about 1145, in Luxembourg, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 14 August 1181, in Vieux Condé, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas I D'Oisy Lord of Avesnes est né le 18 avril 1123, à Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Ida de Mortagne, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de la Roche environ 1145, à Luxembourg, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 août 1181, à Vieux Condé, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas I D'Oisy Lord of Avesnes am 18. April 1123 in Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy 24 und seine Mutter Ida de Mortagne 29. Er hat um 1145 in Luxemburg, Belgien Matilda de la Roche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. August 1181 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Vieux Condé, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas I D'Oisy Lord of Avesnes è nato il il 18 aprile 1123 nel Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Ida de Mortagne, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de la Roche circa 1145, nel Lussemburgo, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 agosto 1181, nel Vieux Condé, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas I D'Oisy Lord of Avesnesが1123年4月18日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードエイベスネス-スル-ヘルペで生まれた時，父Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisyは24歳，母Ida de Mortagneは29歳であった。約1145年にベルギールクセンボウルグでMatilda de la Rocheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1181年8月14日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードヴィエウックス コンドeで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas I D'Oisy Lord of Avesnes(이)가 1123년 4월 18일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 에베스네스-수-헬프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Ida de Mortagne(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1145년 벨기에 루세보우르그에서 Matilda de la Roche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1181년 8월 14일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 비우스 콘드e에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1157: de 8 de janeiro de 1157 a 7 de janeiro de 1158
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas I D'Oisy Lord of Avesnes nasceu em 18 de abril de 1123, em Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Ida de Mortagne, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda de la Roche aproximadamente 1145, em Luxemburgo, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1181, em Vieux Condé, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas I D'Oisy Lord of Avesnes родился 18 апреля 1123 г. в местности авеснес-сур-хелп, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Ida de Mortagne, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de la Roche около 1145 г. в местности луксембург, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 августа 1181 г. в местности виеукс кондe, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Matilda de la Roche aproximadamente 1145, en Luxemburgo, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de agosto de 1181, en Vieux Condé, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
